rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE HAGAN FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Deposition Questions And For Sanctions; Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Tuesday, September 23, 2008. Respondent Bernard Hagan¿s Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Deposition Questions is granted. Any attorney client privilege that might have attached to the letter has been waived as the letter has not been maintained in confidence. The court finds that Petitioner¿s opposition was not made with substantial justification. Sanctions are awarded against Petitioner in the amount of $1,140, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. =(EAH/612)
